## Scope

- [ ] Single-purpose change
- [ ] No unrelated refactors
- [ ] No generated/review artifacts committed unless requested

## Tests

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make type`
- [ ] `make audit-scan`
- [ ] Docs updated or not needed

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, keys, or tokens included
- [ ] Docs/examples use env var names only
- [ ] External/network behavior remains opt-in
